title: cMCP Audit Chain Entry
description: A single entry in the append-only audit chain maintained inside the cMCP Gateway TEE.

entry_id.description: Unique identifier for this audit chain entry.

sequence_number.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number within the session.

timestamp_utc.description: UTC timestamp at which this entry was recorded.

session_id.description: Session to which this entry belongs.

call_id.description: Unique identifier for the tool call this entry records.

entry_type.description: Type of event recorded by this entry.

tool_name.description: Name of the tool invoked; null for non-tool-call entry types.

server_identity.description: Identity of the MCP server involved; null when not applicable.

policy_decision.description: Cedar policy decision for this entry; null for non-evaluated entry types.

policy_rule_matched.description: Cedar rule ID or name that produced the policy decision; null if no rule matched or not applicable.

latency_us.description: End-to-end latency in microseconds for this tool call; null for non-call entries.

request_payload_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical request payload; NOT the payload itself. Null when not applicable.

response_payload_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical response payload. Null when not applicable.

response_inspection_result.description: Result of response inspection by the gateway; null for non-tool-call entries.

external_execution_evidence.description: Optional independent execution evidence bound to this call (issue #301). Distinct from response_payload_hash: response_payload_hash is what the gateway forwarded, this is what an independent authority (e.g. a safety controller) attested. Null when absent. Intentionally not in 'required' so entries that predate the field still validate.

issuer.description: Identity (e.g. SPIFFE URI) of the authority that signed the receipt.

issuer_key_id.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest of the raw Ed25519 issuer public key used to verify the signature.

signature.description: base64url Ed25519 signature over the canonical receipt (all fields except signature).

evidence_hash.description: sha256:<hex> of the attested execution evidence (e.g. the controller decision payload).

evidence_type.description: Receipt type and version, e.g. controller-execution-receipt/v1.

linked_call_id.description: The call_id this receipt is bound to; a verifier checks it equals the entry call_id.

session_sensitivity_before.description: Session sensitivity level before this entry was processed.

session_sensitivity_after.description: Session sensitivity level after this entry was processed.

prev_entry_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the previous entry in the chain; the literal string 'genesis' for the first entry.

entry_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of this entry's canonical JSON, excluding the entry_hash field itself.
